title: JAIL INFORMATION - 211info
text: TILLAMOOK COUNTY SHERIFF'S OFFICE JAIL INFORMATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Operates correctional facilities for adults in custody. Assists families in locating an adult in custody within the corrections system. Provides in-person and video visitation opportunities for adults in custody and visitors. Processes bail and commissary transactions. 5995 Long Prairie Road Tillamook, OR 97141 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (503) 842-2561 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Jail Information (503) 842-2561 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, email, visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Tillamook County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: From Portland take US Highway 26 West. From left lane turn Southwest on State Route 6 about one hour to Tillamook. Turn South on Highway 101 (Main Street) and travel about three miles. Turn East on Long Prairie Road (overhead flashing yellow light) and go one mile. Turn South into Sheriff's Office driveway. From Tillamook go South on Highway 101 (Main St) and travel about three miles. Turn East on Long Prairie Rd (overhead flashing yellow light) and go one mile. Turn South into Sheriff's Office driveway (Schneidecker Lane). Park in front and enter near flag pole. Services: County Correctional Facilities Prisoner Locator Services Other Services Offered At This Location: LAW ENFORCEMENT AGENCIES - SHERIFF'S OFFICE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. TILLAMOOK COUNTY SHERIFF'S OFFICE
